title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at FM Logistic India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at FM Logistic India
jsonLd.description:
FM Logistic India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FM Logistic India:
FM Logistic India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FM Logistic India!
